0.text: Peripheral ground glass opacities in the posterobasal and anterobasal segments of the left upper lobe apicoposterior segment and the right lower lobe

1.text: Minimal consolidation in the posterobasal and anterobasal segments of the left upper lobe apicoposterior segment and the right lower lobe

2.text: Round-shaped consolidations in the left lower lobe and the upper lobe lingular segment
